title: Southern Thai Chicken Gaeng Curry
description: A deliciously rich and flavorful curry dish featuring tender chicken, caramelized onions, and a blend of southern Thai spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the caramelized onions and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the southern Thai curry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the fish sauce, brown sugar, gaeng curry leaves, and chicken broth.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, for 10-15 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with additional gaeng curry leaves and serve immediately.
